---
id: nov23-5
name: Clear Sign of Quality
technique: list
platforms: [linkedin]
tags: [list, mindset, positive-behaviors, community, call-to-action]
source_month: "2023-11"
---

## Why It Works

The post clicked because it's all about cheering each other on — something the LinkedIn community is built around. It's a breath of fresh air compared to the usual online drama and a nod to growing both personally and professionally. It's like a high-five to the good vibes and support that make LinkedIn the place for professionals to connect.

## Template

A clear sign of [positive quality]:
You believe in [positive outcome or shared success].
When I see [negative behavior], I recognize [negative trait].
Because the best people in [context or place] have a [type of mindset] mindset.
"[Inspirational quote or idea]"
They [positive action].
It's that simple.
Here are [number] most common things I see [positive descriptors] people doing:
1. [Positive action]
2. [Positive action]
3. [Positive action]
4. [Positive action]
Remember: [Summary statement or call to action].
Or don't — and miss out on [consequence of inaction].

## Example

A clear sign of health awareness:
You believe in nurturing your body and mind together.
When I see people choosing quick diets over sustainable habits, I recognize a short-term mindset.
Because the best people in the wellness community have a long-term health mindset.
"Health is a journey, not a one-time destination."
They make consistent choices.
It's that simple.
Here are 4 most common things I see informed, dedicated, health-conscious people doing:
1. Prioritizing sleep
2. Choosing whole foods over processed ones
3. Incorporating movement throughout the day
4. Practicing mindfulness regularly
Remember: Nourish your body to empower your life.
Or don't — and miss out on the profound benefits of good health.
